overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a highway bridge in a mountainous region. The character passes a highway sign for Blaine County and Paleto Bay, then stops to look over the concrete bridge railing at the scenic valley below with dirt roads and a river, before continuing along the bridge as vehicles pass by.

events.description: passing the green highway sign for Blaine County and Paleto Bay

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder past the directional sign

notable_agents.action: white car driving along the highway in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: green highway sign with white text indicating Blaine County and Paleto Bay
silver metal guardrail along the highway edge
rocky mountain peaks with sparse vegetation in the background
tall evergreen trees clustered on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a highway cutting through mountainous terrain. The camera moves forward along the shoulder, passing a green highway sign for Blaine County and Paleto Bay. A metal guardrail runs along the right side, with pine trees and rocky mountains visible in the distance. A white car drives past on the highway to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge overlook with scenic valley view

events.description: turning to look over the concrete bridge railing at the valley below
slowing to observe the winding dirt roads and river in the valley

agents.ego_description: standing at the bridge railing looking down into the valley, observing the landscape

entered.detail: weathered concrete bridge railing with vertical openings and decorative pillars
winding dirt road cutting through the valley floor below
narrow river or creek running through the valley bottom

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the bridge railing and looks down into a deep valley. The concrete bridge railing dominates the right foreground, while the view opens to reveal winding dirt roads, scattered pine trees, and a river cutting through the valley floor. The mountains now appear on the left side across the valley. The character slows to observe the scenic landscape below.

events.description: turning back to face the highway and resuming walking pace
motorcycle and truck pass by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the bridge sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the adjacent highway

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past on the highway
large truck driving along the highway

entered.detail: tall curved street light pole along the highway edge
utility poles with power lines running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face the highway and continues walking along the bridge. The concrete railing now runs along the right side at a distance, while street lights and power lines appear along the left. Vehicles including a motorcycle and a large truck pass by on the highway. The mountains are now visible on the right side as the character proceeds along the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain highway that shifts from a forward trek past road signage to a scenic overlook before returning to the flow of traffic. It begins by moving along the shoulder of a highway cutting through rocky terrain, passing a green sign for Blaine County and Paleto Bay as a white car drives past. As the camera reaches the bridge, the perspective shifts downward over the concrete railing to reveal a deep valley filled with winding dirt roads, pine trees, and a river. The scene then turns back toward the road, moving forward again as street lights and power lines emerge on the left. Finally, the camera proceeds along the bridge while a motorcycle and a large truck pass by, with the mountains now framing the right side of the view.
